title: Sankara Nethralaya is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sankara Nethralaya is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Sankara Nethralaya, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sankara Nethralaya:
Sankara Nethralaya is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya!
